facebook.caption:
POV: you're walking Trần Hưng Đạo and you almost skip Phở Chào. Don't be that person.

4.8 stars. 93 reviews. A bowl of phở on a street lined with tourist traps. This one locals actually back.

Find it at 127/2 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Khu phố 7. Show up hungry.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Steam rising. Bowl lands on the table. 4.8 stars on Trần Hưng Đạo and most tourists walk straight past Phở Chào. Not anymore.
